headline: Solid Results Lifted Equinix (EQIX) in Q1
summary: Baron Capital, an investment management company, released its Q4 2025 letter for its “Baron Real Estate Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. Baron Real Estate Fund was recognized as the Best Real Estate Fund Over Three Years at the 2026 LSEG Lipper Funds Awards, reflecting the three-year performance ending December 31, […]

headline: Equinix: Steady Eddy, A Steady Hold, Patience Required At Current Valuation
summary: Equinix is trading at ~24.6x forward P/AFFO, in line with its 7-year historical average of ~24.9x. Read why I rate EQIX stock a Hold for now.
